description_long: This is a compact, sporty red convertible car with a sleek, aerodynamic body and a low profile. The vehicle features a two-door design, open roof, and a pair of brown bucket seats visible from the side. The front end is characterized by a wide grille, prominent headlights, and a smooth hood, while the rear is simple with a single horizontal bumper. The tires are thick and labeled with white text, giving the car a performance-oriented look. The windshield is slightly tinted, and the interior appears minimalistic with a visible steering wheel. The overall design suggests a modern, urban-friendly convertible ideal for city driving.
description: A sporty red two-door convertible with brown seats, thick tires, and a sleek, open-roof design. Features a wide grille, prominent headlights, and a minimalistic interior.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide grille, prominent headlights, and the open windshield.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the open roof, brown seats, thick tires, and door details.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the simple bumper, taillights, and the back of the seats.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the open cabin, brown seats, and tire details.
